item.title: List of blogs and technical content 👇
item.description: Thanks to consistent blogging and technical writing over many years (started as passion!), I have gained audience across multiple platforms. Rather than re-post the same content here, I welcome you to check out my blogs and other technical content on any of the below platforms.

item.title: whoami
item.description: Hi, I am Abhishek! 👋 👋 I really enjoy working at the intersection of Databases, Go and AppDev ecosystem (across Serverless, containers).

item.title: Presentations
item.description: Vector Databases for generative AI applications (GIDS 2024) Vector databases operationalise embedding models at scale and enable lightning-fast searches based on semantic similarity.

item.title: Please Do Not Read
item.description: These are controversial, unpopular, highly opinionated, snarky takes on DA/DevRel (and maybe thought-provoking?) Any resemblance to real person(s), is not at all coincidental 😉

item.title: Publications
item.description: I enjoy working on deep-dive technical content. These include self-published books which are available on Leanpub. Mastering Apache Kafka (course): Apache Kafka is a distributed streaming platform designed to handle real-time data streaming and processing in a distributed and fault-tolerant manner.

item.title: OSS projects
item.description: My day-to-day work involves open-source projects (databases, messaging systems etc.). In addition to teaching and advocating for these technologies, I contribute back in the form of features, documentation etc.
